name: Consolidated Gold Holdings, Inc
summary: WGE Holdings Corp. develops a direct response marketing application. It offers online response marketing and communication services. The company's services included delivery and tracking of video enhanced media promotions, newsletters, public and investor relation news releases, and distance learning. WGE Holdings Corp. was formerly known as DigiLava Inc. and changed its name to WGE Holdings Corp. in April 2015. The company is based in San Francisco, California.
